heading: Administrative appeal of liens
label: 6326 Administrative appeal of liens
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 6326 was renumbered 6327 of this title.

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: In such form and at such time as the Secretary shall prescribe by regulations, any person shall be allowed to appeal to the Secretary after the filing of a notice of a lien under this subchapter on the property or the rights to property of such person for a release of such lien alleging an error in the filing of the notice of such lien.

children.heading: Certificate of release
children.label: b Certificate of release
children.text: If the Secretary determines that the filing of the notice of any lien was erroneous, the Secretary shall expeditiously (and, to the extent practicable, within 14 days after such determination) issue a certificate of release of such lien and shall include in such certificate a statement that such filing was erroneous.
